content:
IVX GLOBAL OPPORTUNITY INTELLIGENCE ENGINE

Repository:
ibb142/rork-ivxholding--1

MISSION

Build IVX into an Autonomous Global Opportunity Intelligence Platform.

The system continuously searches public information and produces verified opportunities.

It DOES NOT send emails, messages, or make commitments automatically.
Those require owner approval.

==================================
ENGINE 1
GLOBAL INVESTOR DISCOVERY
==================================

Search public sources for:

- Private investors
- Family offices
- Angel investors
- Real estate investment firms
- Private equity
- Opportunity funds
- Qualified institutional buyers
- Accredited investor groups
- High-net-worth networks

Collect:

Company
Website
Public contact
Location
Investment focus
Typical investment size
Industries
Confidence score

==================================
ENGINE 2
DIRECT LENDER DISCOVERY
==================================

Continuously discover:

Private lenders
Bridge lenders
Construction lenders
Debt funds
Hard money lenders
Commercial lenders
Institutional lenders

Rank by:

Loan type
LTV
Geography
Property type
Speed
Confidence

==================================
ENGINE 3
TOKENIZED INVESTOR NETWORK
==================================

Identify communities interested in:

Fractional investing
Tokenized real estate
Crowdfunding
Alternative investments

Estimate:

Audience
Investment range
Geographic relevance

==================================
ENGINE 4
ZIP CODE BUYER ENGINE
==================================

Input:

Property address
ZIP code
Radius

Search public information for:

Brokerages
Developers
Investment firms
Property owners
Corporate real estate operators
Market activity

Generate a ranked opportunity list.

==================================
ENGINE 5
CORPORATE CAPITAL ENGINE
==================================

Find organizations publicly active in:

Joint ventures
Land acquisition
Development
Hospitality
Industrial
Office
Multifamily

Rank by strategic fit.

==================================
ENGINE 6
MARKET INTELLIGENCE
==================================

Every day search for:

New AI technologies
Construction technologies
PropTech
FinTech
Investment trends
Government programs
Public grants

Score:

Business impact
Implementation effort
Priority

==================================
ENGINE 7
JV MATCHING
==================================

Compare:

IVX projects

against

Publicly available investor and company profiles.

Rank matches using:

Location
Property type
Capital range
Investment thesis

Return a confidence score.

==================================
ENGINE 8
OPPORTUNITY SCORING
==================================

Each opportunity receives:

Strategic Fit
Estimated Capital
Location Match
Industry Match
Priority
Confidence

==================================
ENGINE 9
EXECUTIVE REPORT

Every 5 hours produce:

New investor opportunities

New lenders

New corporate opportunities

New AI technologies

New market trends

High-priority business opportunities

Top 20 ranked opportunities

Blocked items

Recommended next actions

==================================
RULES

Use public, lawfully available information only.

Do not fabricate contacts.

Do not contact anyone automatically.

Do not commit IVX to any agreement.

Require owner approval before outreach.

Every recommendation must include the source and a confidence score.

FINAL STATUS

The engine is COMPLETE only when it continuously discovers, scores, and reports new opportunities with evidence while operating under governance and approval controls.IVX GLOBAL OPPORTUNITY ENGINE — DAILY TARGETS STARTING TODAY

Repository:
ibb142/rork-ivxholding--1

MISSION:
Every day, IVX must independently search public sources and produce 50 to 500 new opportunity records by category.

Do not contact anyone automatically.
Owner approval required before outreach.

DAILY MINIMUM TARGETS:

1. Private Investors
Minimum: 50/day
Target: 100–500/day

2. Direct Lenders
Minimum: 50/day
Target: 100–300/day

3. Individual Investors
Minimum: 100/day
Target: 500/day
Investment range:
$100 to $100,000

4. Tokenized Real Estate Investors
Minimum: 50/day
Target: 300/day

5. South Florida Buyers
Minimum: 50/day
Target: 300/day

Search by:
- ZIP code
- city
- zoning
- property type
- sale price range
- buyer activity

6. JV Deal Partners
Minimum: 25/day
Target: 150/day

7. Corporate / Enterprise Capital
Minimum: 25/day
Target: 150/day

8. Land Buyers / Developers
Minimum: 25/day
Target: 150/day

9. Real Estate Funds
Minimum: 25/day
Target: 100/day

10. New AI / PropTech / FinTech Technology
Minimum: 20/day
Target: 100/day

FOR EACH RECORD RETURN:

Name:
Company:
Category:
Website:
Public contact source:
Location:
ZIP code:
Capital range:
Investment focus:
Property type:
Zoning match:
Confidence score:
Source URL:
Reason it fits IVX:
Recommended next action:

SCORING:

A+ = strongest match
A = strong
B = possible
C = low confidence
UNVERIFIED = insufficient proof

REPORT EVERY 5 HOURS:

Total found today:
Private investors:
Direct lenders:
Individual investors:
Tokenized investors:
South Florida buyers:
JV partners:
Corporate capital:
Land/developer buyers:
Funds:
New technologies:

Top 20 opportunities:
Blocked searches:
Next 5-hour plan:

RULES:
Use public information only.
Do not fabricate names or contacts.
Do not scrape private data.
Do not send messages automatically.
Save all opportunities to IVX CRM.
Owner must approve outreach.

FINAL_STATUS:
COMPLETE only if daily opportunity engine is running, saving records, scoring leads, and producing 5-hour reports. After  completing  deploy live and provide evidence too
